subject: [PATCH v2 13/14] selftests/mm: add userfaultfd RWP tests

2026-05-22.patch_summary: This patch adds userfaultfd (UFFD) read-write-protect (RWP) tests to the Linux kernel selftest suite. The tests cover various scenarios, including asynchronous and synchronous RWP modes, page mapping, memory protection, and fork operations. The tests verify that UFFDIO_REGISTER_MODE_RWP and UFFDIO_RWPROTECT work correctly in different situations, ensuring that page permissions are properly restored and protected. The patch includes 11 test cases that cover various types of memory (anon, shmem, hugetlb) and edge cases like fork() and mprotect().
